narrative:
Hillsboro Nw (precinct in Highland County) has 1,346 registered voters, with 63.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.7 percentage points.
